query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM projects; SELECT COUNT(*) as test_projects FROM projects WHERE name LIKE '%Teste%' OR name LIKE '%teste%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%E2E%' OR name LIKE '%Segurança%' OR name LIKE '%Acesso%' OR name LIKE '%Persistência%' OR name LIKE '%Transições%' OR name LIKE '%Histórico%' OR name LIKE '%Action Plans%';
